diagrams.title: Constructor Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows all types of constructors and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different constructor types and when to use each

diagrams.title: Constructor Execution Order in Inheritance
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing base class constructor executes first, then member objects, then derived class
elements: Execution flows from top to bottom
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the initialization sequence in inheritance hierarchy

diagrams.title: Copy Constructor Invocation Scenarios
diagrams.description: Diagram showing 4 main scenarios when copy constructor is called
elements: Passing object to another class constructor
diagrams.purpose: Remembering all cases where copy constructor is invoked

diagrams.title: Member Initializer List Syntax
diagrams.description: Shows the structure: Constructor(params) : member1(val1), member2(val2) { body }
diagrams.purpose: Understanding correct syntax for initializer list
